# AppStoreVersionUpdateRequest.Data.Relationships

**Object**

The data and links that describe the relationship between the resources.

## Declaration

```swift
object AppStoreVersionUpdateRequest.Data.Relationships
```

## Objects

- **AppStoreVersionUpdateRequest.Data.Relationships.AppClipDefaultExperience**: The relationship to the Default App Clip Default Experiences resource you set with the request that updates the App Store Versions resource.
- **AppStoreVersionUpdateRequest.Data.Relationships.Build**: The data and links that describe the relationship between the resources.

## Objects

- **AppStoreVersionUpdateRequest.Data.Attributes**: Attributes whose values you’re changing as part of the update request.
